intro.step1: Pick a starting point — Pneuma copies it into your workspace so you can riff from there.
intro.step2: Or describe what you want to make. Pneuma writes the files; the panel shows the result as it goes.
intro.step3: Edit anytime. Pneuma watches the workspace and follows your lead.

cards.heading: Pick a starting point
cards.subheading: {{count}} ready-made templates. Click one to load it into your workspace.
cards.subheading_one: One ready-made template. Click to load it into your workspace.

cards.empty: This mode doesn't ship templates yet. Start by describing what you want — Pneuma will build it from scratch.

noSeed.body: This mode doesn't ship templates. Describe what you want in the chat on the right and Pneuma will build it from scratch — the viewer behind is your live workspace.
